arts.ttl: Tottenham official takes on transfer hunt in Lisbon – On chase for ‘potential reinforcements’
arts.sum: Tottenham had a scout in attendance this week to watch Sporting Club de Portugal’s 1-0 win over Porto. That’s according to A Bola, who say Tottenham were one of several sides with a scout at the game alongside the likes of Manchester United. FSG's stance on Liverpool sale revealed amid Elon Musk interest
arts.sum: Liverpool owners Fenway Sports Group are reported to have "no appetite" to sell the club to controversial and divisive billionaire Elon Musk.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Tottenham offered €80m Randal Kolo Muani
arts.sum: "His agent's been given an open door to offer him to any club to see if they can find the deal, which Paris Saint-Germain would prefer to be a purchase," says The Transfers Podcast's Duncan Castles. PSG have now told Kolo Muani's representatives they can explore potential transfers, with the French champions preferring a sale to facilitate their plans for a new striker.
